stories.title: Murakami Hits 20th HR — Most by Any MLB Rookie Since 1901 (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Munetaka Murakami hit his 20th home run of the season Wednesday night.

Most by any MLB rookie at this point in the season since 1901.

432 feet. Off a 93.9 mph fastball. Would've gone out in all 30 stadiums. ⚾💥 #WhiteSox #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Murakami is only the 3rd White Sox player to hit 20 HRs before June in franchise history.

The team has played since 1901.

He's doing this in his first MLB season. 🔥 #WhiteSox #MLB

stories.title: Cristopher Sánchez 44⅔ Scoreless Innings — Breaks 115-Year-Old Phillies Record (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Cristopher Sánchez's scoreless innings streak: 44⅔.

That breaks Grover Cleveland Alexander's Phillies franchise record — set in 1911.

115 years. Gone. 5 straight starts of 7+ shutout innings. ⚾👏 #Phillies #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Where Sánchez's 44⅔ scoreless innings stand all-time:

No. 7 in a single MLB season, all time.

Orel Hershiser's 1988 record is 59 innings. The chase is on. 🎯 #Phillies #MLB

stories.title: Aaron Ashby 9-0 — First Pitcher to 9 Wins, Brewers Lead NL Central (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Aaron Ashby is 9-0 with a 2.06 ERA.

No other pitcher in MLB has more than 8 wins right now.

Brewers are 33-20. Won 20 of their last 27. Top of the NL Central. ⚾🔥 #Brewers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
The Brewers just swept the Cardinals at home.

First time they've done that since June 10-12, 2011.

15 years. Ashby's 9th win sealed it. Milwaukee is rolling. ⚾ #Brewers #MLB

stories.title: Yordan Alvarez Hits 20th HR — Ties Murakami for AL Lead (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Yordan Alvarez went deep twice against Texas last night.

HR No. 1: 428 feet off Jacob deGrom.
HR No. 20: 8th inning, gave Astros the lead for good.

First time he's homered in back-to-back games in 8 big league seasons. 💪 #Astros #MLB

stories.title: Kyle Schwarber Makes MLB History With 20-HR Milestone (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 5-1
x_posts.text:
Kyle Schwarber has 20 home runs through his team's first 49 games.

That's the earliest date in MLB history to reach 20 HRs.

He passed Luis Gonzalez's record from May 17, 2001. He's on pace for 66 HRs in 2026. 🚀 #Phillies #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 5-2
x_posts.text:
Schwarber's 20 HRs through 49 games:

✅ Only 18th player in MLB history
✅ First since Josh Hamilton (2012)
✅ Slash line: .237/.365/.645, 35 RBI

The Phillies gave him 5 years/$150M in December. This is why. ⚾ #Phillies #MLB
